name: Veganuary
description: Month-long global campaign encouraging plant-based eating to reduce the environmental impact of food systems, covering emissions, land use, waste and everyday consumer choices.
content_hook: Frame plant-based choices as a tangible climate action. Tie into New Year resolution energy and sustainable lifestyle messaging.

name: International Net Zero Summit 2026
description: Landmark gathering of policymakers, corporate leaders, investors, and sustainability practitioners exploring Net Zero pathways, carbon credits, and blockchain-based transparency.
content_hook: India Net Zero momentum. Clients can share decarbonisation progress or India-specific climate strategies aligned with India's 2070 target.

name: International Day of Clean Energy
description: UN observance promoting awareness and action for a just and inclusive transition to clean energy for the benefit of people and the planet.
content_hook: Energy access and innovation stories. Highlight clean energy breakthroughs or client contributions to the energy transition.

name: World Wetlands Day
description: Raises awareness about wetlands — critical for biodiversity, climate mitigation and adaptation, and freshwater availability. Nearly 90% of wetlands have been degraded since the 1700s.
content_hook: Water-focused clients can tie into freshwater scarcity narratives. Strong visual storytelling opportunity around ecosystem restoration.

name: India Sustainability Summit 2026
description: Theme: 'Sustainability as Strategy: Building a Green, Responsible, and Future-Ready India.' Brings together corporate leaders on ESG, climate action, and circular innovation.
content_hook: India-based clients can align thought leadership content with summit themes. ESG strategy positioning opportunity.

name: World Day of Social Justice
description: Global reminder that everyone deserves equal rights, fair treatment, and the chance to thrive. Highlights poverty, inequality, decent work, and education access.
content_hook: Just transition and equity messaging. Connect climate action to social outcomes — who benefits, who bears the burden.

name: World Sustainable Development Summit (WSDS) 2026
description: Silver Jubilee edition of TERI's flagship summit. Theme: 'Transformations — Vision, Voices, and Values for Sustainable Development.' The only independently convened international sustainability summit based in the Global South.
content_hook: Major India sustainability moment. Clients can comment on key announcements or share their own sustainability milestones and thought leadership.

name: International Polar Bear Day
description: Annual event raising awareness about polar bear conservation and the impact of climate warming on Arctic habitats.
content_hook: Climate change made tangible through a charismatic species. Powerful visual content day — connect warming to real-world impact.

name: World Wildlife Day
description: Celebrates and raises awareness of the world's wild animals and plants and their vital role in sustaining life on Earth.
content_hook: Strong visual content day. Brands can connect biodiversity to their supply chains or operational footprint.

name: International Women's Day
description: Celebrates women's achievements and calls for gender equality — increasingly intersecting with climate justice and frontline community leadership.
content_hook: Highlight women in climate leadership, sustainability roles, or frontline communities. Intersectional storytelling that connects gender equity to environmental outcomes.

name: Food Waste Action Week
description: The UK's biggest annual food waste reduction campaign, highlighting environmental impact of food waste and offering practical solutions for households and businesses.
content_hook: Behaviour change content. Practical tips, impact data on food waste emissions. Works for any brand touching food supply chains.

name: Global Recycling Day
description: Recognises recycling's role in saving 700M+ tonnes of carbon emissions annually and advocates for a joined-up global approach to recycling.
content_hook: Circular economy messaging. Materials-focused brands can showcase lifecycle thinking, waste reduction impact, or recycled-content innovation.

name: International Day of Forests
description: Celebrates the importance of all types of forests for biodiversity, climate regulation, and human livelihoods.
content_hook: Reforestation, carbon sequestration, and sustainable materials sourcing stories. Visual storytelling with strong emotional resonance.

name: World Water Day
description: Focuses on the importance of freshwater and advocates for sustainable management of water resources. A critical day for water scarcity awareness.
content_hook: Critical day for water-tech and water-access brands. Tie into water scarcity data, innovation stories, and the water-climate nexus.

name: World Meteorological Day
description: Highlights the role of meteorological and climate services in disaster preparedness, agriculture, and everyday life.
content_hook: Climate data storytelling — connect weather extremes to the need for climate adaptation and early warning systems.

name: CERAWeek
description: Major annual energy conference where oil, gas, and energy transition leaders gather. Signals what's happening in the real energy economy.
content_hook: Monitor announcements for energy transition signals. Good moment for contrasting fossil fuel vs. clean energy narratives and tracking corporate commitments.

name: WTO Ministerial Meeting
description: Trade and climate overlap — EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) coming into force in 2026 makes this meeting significant for trade-exposed economies.
content_hook: Carbon border adjustment implications for exporters. Relevant for India and Ecuador trade-exposed clients. Track how trade policy shapes climate outcomes.

name: Earth Hour
description: Global lights-off event at 8:30 PM local time symbolising commitment to the planet. One of the most recognised climate action moments globally.
content_hook: Simple participation moment. Brands can share 'lights off' visuals or behind-the-scenes sustainability stories. High social media engagement potential.

name: International Day of Zero Waste
description: Promotes sustainable consumption and production patterns and raises awareness about how zero-waste initiatives contribute to the 2030 Agenda.
content_hook: Zero waste commitments, packaging innovation, and circular design stories. Practical tips that resonate with conscious consumers.

name: World Health Day
description: Draws attention to global health issues — increasingly linked to climate change, air pollution, water quality, and environmental health.
content_hook: Connect environmental quality to public health outcomes. Air quality, water purity, green spaces, heat stress — all relevant hooks.

name: San Francisco Climate Week
region_detail: San Francisco Bay Area, CA, USA
description: Decentralised week-long gathering — 25,000+ attendees, 650+ events across the Bay Area. Connects climate tech, policy, business, art, and community action.
content_hook: Directly relevant for Sample Client (SF-based). Opportunity to attend, host side events, or create content around Bay Area climate innovation and startup culture.

name: Earth Day
description: One of the most visible environmental dates globally. Used for major announcements, annual sustainability campaigns, and public climate commitments.
content_hook: Anchor content day. Every client should have something planned — annual sustainability updates, campaign launches, pledges, or impact reports.

name: Global Action Days 2026
description: Mobilising 1M+ people across 150+ countries on the link between climate change and access to safe, nutritious, sustainable food.
content_hook: Food-system and agriculture messaging. Connect food choices to climate outcomes. Educational content angle works well for community-facing brands.

name: World Day for Safety and Health at Work
description: Focuses on worker safety and decent work — connects to just transition, ethical supply chains, and green jobs.
content_hook: Just transition messaging. Brands with manufacturing or supply chain stories can highlight worker welfare and safe working conditions.

name: International Conference on Just Transition Away from Fossil Fuels
description: Landmark gathering uniting governments and experts to push concrete action toward a just, coordinated phase-out of fossil fuels ahead of COP31.
content_hook: LATAM climate leadership moment — regional energy transition narratives and South American climate policy signals.

name: World Tuna Day
description: Raises awareness of ocean biodiversity, sustainable fishing practices, and the economic importance of tuna fisheries globally.
content_hook: Ocean health and sustainable sourcing angle for brands with marine or food supply chain connections.

name: World Migratory Bird Day (Spring)
description: Awareness-raising campaign highlighting the need for conservation of migratory birds and their habitats. Celebrated twice yearly (May and October).
content_hook: Biodiversity and habitat connectivity stories. Visual, feel-good content with conservation messaging.

name: World Bee Day
description: Highlights the role of pollinators in food security and ecosystem health. Bees and other pollinators are critical for 75% of food crops.
content_hook: Biodiversity storytelling with high engagement potential. Connect to agriculture, food systems, and what happens when pollinators disappear.

name: International Day for Biological Diversity
description: Raises awareness of biodiversity issues aligned with the Kunming-Montreal Global Biodiversity Framework. Focus on nature-positive action.
content_hook: Biodiversity commitments, nature-positive framing. Brands can share their biodiversity impact assessments or nature-related commitments.

name: World Environment Day
description: The UN's principal vehicle for encouraging worldwide environmental awareness and action. Largest global platform for environmental outreach — millions engage annually.
content_hook: Biggest sustainability content day alongside Earth Day. All clients need strong, planned content. Campaign launches, impact reports, and public commitments.

name: World Oceans Day
description: Highlights marine protection, plastic pollution, packaging challenges, and ocean ecosystem health.
content_hook: Plastic pollution, ocean conservation, and blue economy messaging. Strong visual content opportunities with underwater imagery and beach cleanups.

name: World Day Against Child Labour
description: Reinforces ethical labour practices across supply chains and highlights the connection between child labour and environmental exploitation.
content_hook: Supply chain ethics angle. Brands can highlight fair labour practices, responsible sourcing, and due diligence in supply chains.

name: EU Sustainable Energy Week
description: Focuses on renewables, efficiency, and energy transition across Europe. Major policy platform for EU energy direction.
content_hook: EU energy policy direction and regulatory signals. Relevant for brands with European markets or clean energy technology focus.

name: World Day to Combat Desertification and Drought
description: Connects climate risk, land restoration, and resilience. Highlights the 2 billion people living in degraded land areas worldwide.
content_hook: Water scarcity, land degradation, and drought resilience. Highly relevant for water-tech, agriculture, and climate adaptation brands.

name: Sustainable Gastronomy Day
description: Celebrates food traditions that are sustainable, promoting local ingredients, reduced waste, and cultural food heritage.
content_hook: Local food systems, farm-to-table, and cultural food traditions. Engaging lifestyle content that connects food to sustainability.

name: Climate Week London / World Conference on Climate Change & Sustainability
description: 5th edition themed 'Solutions for Climate: Innovation, Equity & Sustainability'. Brings together climate experts, policymakers, and innovators globally.
content_hook: European climate thought leadership moment. Good for brands with UK/EU presence or audiences to position around innovation and equity.

name: Trellis Impact 2026
description: Major sustainability business conference at Moscone West — 500+ speakers, 4,000+ attendees covering carbon, energy, circular economy, and climate tech.
content_hook: Another SF moment for Sample Client. Track trends in corporate sustainability, climate tech, and carbon removal for content ideas and networking.

name: UN High-Level Political Forum (HLPF)
description: Annual UN forum reviewing progress on SDGs — 2026 focuses on Goals 6 (Water), 7 (Energy), 9 (Industry/Innovation), 11 (Cities), and 17 (Partnerships).
content_hook: SDG alignment content. Brands can map their impact to SDGs 6, 7, 9, 11, and 17 and share progress stories.

name: International Day for Conservation of Mangrove Ecosystems
description: Raises awareness of mangrove ecosystems and their role in coastal resilience, blue carbon storage, and marine biodiversity.
content_hook: Blue carbon and coastal resilience angle — mangroves as critical coastal ecosystems.

name: Latin America Climate Summit (LACS)
description: Premier gathering for carbon market practitioners in Latin America and Caribbean — 800+ delegates on carbon pricing, climate finance, and market cooperation.
content_hook: LATAM carbon market developments, climate finance signals, and regional policy direction.

name: International Day of the World's Indigenous Peoples
description: Celebrates indigenous cultures and highlights their critical role in environmental stewardship, land management, and climate adaptation.
content_hook: Indigenous knowledge and environmental stewardship. Relevant for Ecuador and India — frontline communities in climate adaptation and biodiversity conservation.

name: International Day of Clean Air for Blue Skies
description: Focuses on tackling air pollution through individual, community, and government action. Air pollution kills 7 million people annually.
content_hook: Air quality messaging. Relevant for clients in air monitoring, clean tech, urban sustainability, or health-environment intersections.

name: International Day for Preservation of the Ozone Layer
description: Celebrates the Montreal Protocol's success in protecting the ozone layer — proof that global environmental cooperation can work.
content_hook: A rare environmental success story. Use as a 'proof that global cooperation works' narrative — hopeful messaging in a year of climate urgency.

name: World Cleanup Day
description: Global social action day combating litter by encouraging communities worldwide to clean up their environments.
content_hook: Community engagement and team participation moment. Brands can organise local cleanups and share visual before/after content.

name: Climate Week NYC
description: The biggest global climate event of its kind — 100,000+ participants, 5,500+ leaders, 1,000+ events alongside UN General Assembly. Covers energy, finance, food, transport, nature.
content_hook: Major content moment for ALL clients. Plan thought leadership pieces, partnership announcements, and social media campaigns around this week.

name: UN General Assembly (UNGA 81)
description: Annual gathering of world leaders where climate and sustainability are increasingly central. Sets political tone ahead of COP31.
content_hook: Track policy announcements and national commitments. Monitor for client-relevant regulatory or policy signals in the lead-up to COP31.

name: Global Plastics Treaty Negotiations
description: Next round of global plastics treaty negotiations — potentially August or September 2026. Aiming for a legally binding instrument on plastic pollution.
content_hook: Circular economy and plastic reduction messaging. Major regulatory signal for packaging, materials, FMCG, and consumer brands.

name: Brazil Presidential Election (Round 1)
description: Could determine the future of Amazon deforestation policy and Brazil's climate leadership post-COP30. Lula is current favourite.
content_hook: LATAM climate policy implications. Content hook around how elections shape climate futures and deforestation trajectories.

name: International Day for Disaster Risk Reduction
description: Promotes global culture of disaster risk awareness and reduction. Increasingly linked to climate-driven extreme weather events.
content_hook: Climate adaptation and resilience messaging. Tie extreme weather events to climate change and the need for preparedness and resilient infrastructure.

name: World Food Day
description: Highlights food security, sustainable agriculture, and the food-climate nexus. One of the most important days for food system transformation messaging.
content_hook: Sustainable food systems content. Agriculture and supply chain clients can share impact stories, food security data, and innovation in farming.

name: International Day for the Eradication of Poverty
description: Raises awareness of the need to eradicate poverty — increasingly connected to climate vulnerability and just transition narratives.
content_hook: Climate and poverty intersection. Those least responsible for climate change are most affected — powerful equity messaging.

name: UN Biodiversity Conference (COP17)
description: Follow-up to the Kunming-Montreal Global Biodiversity Framework. Reviews implementation of 30x30 targets and nature-positive commitments globally.
content_hook: Nature-positive commitments and biodiversity targets. All clients should be mapping their impact on nature and aligning with the Global Biodiversity Framework.

name: World Cities Day
description: Promotes sustainable urbanisation and international cooperation on urban challenges including housing, transport, and green infrastructure.
content_hook: Smart cities, urban sustainability, and green infrastructure messaging. Relevant for clients in built environment, transport, or urban tech.

name: Unblocktober
description: Month-long campaign to improve the health of drains, sewers, watercourses, and seas by reducing waste going down the drain.
content_hook: Water pollution and waste reduction. Connects everyday consumer behaviour to ocean health — practical tips content that drives engagement.

name: International Day for Preventing Exploitation of Environment in War
description: Raises awareness of environmental destruction during armed conflict and its lasting impact on ecosystems and communities.
content_hook: Environmental justice angle. Connect conflict zones to ecological degradation and long-term climate vulnerability.

name: COP31 — UN Climate Change Conference
description: The biggest climate event of 2026. Joint Türkiye-Australia presidency. Focus on NDCs 3.0, climate finance (NCQG), post-Global Stocktake implementation, and fossil fuel transition roadmaps.
content_hook: THE single most important climate moment of 2026. All clients need pre/during/post COP content. Track commitments, controversies, outcomes, and what it means for their sector.

name: IMO Marine Environment Protection Committee
description: Overlaps with COP31. Determines green shipping measures after US and Saudi Arabia won a year's delay in 2025. Key moment for maritime decarbonisation.
content_hook: Shipping decarbonisation angle. Relevant for brands with maritime supply chains, blue economy focus, or trade-dependent operations.

name: World Toilet Day
description: Raises awareness of the 3.5 billion people living without access to safely managed sanitation. Connected to water quality and public health.
content_hook: Sanitation and water access messaging. Connects to SDG 6 and public health outcomes. Can be surprisingly engaging content.

name: World Sustainable Transport Day
description: Promotes low-carbon transport and sustainable mobility solutions — from EVs and public transit to cycling infrastructure.
content_hook: Sustainable mobility and transport decarbonisation. Relevant for urban sustainability, EV, and infrastructure-focused brands.

name: UNCCD COP17 — Land/Desertification Conference
description: Third 'triple COP' event of 2026 alongside climate (COP31) and biodiversity (COP17). Focused on land degradation, drought, and desertification.
content_hook: Land restoration and drought resilience. Relevant for water-tech clients and agriculture-linked brands. Ties into food security narratives.

name: UN Water Conference
description: Major UN conference on water — the first in decades. Critical for SDG 6 progress and addressing the global water crisis.
content_hook: Landmark water moment. Huge for water-tech brands. Frame around water scarcity, innovation, and the water-climate-food nexus.

name: World Soil Day
description: Raises awareness of healthy soils as a critical living resource for food production, ecosystem health, and climate regulation.
content_hook: Soil health and regenerative agriculture. Materials and food brands can connect to land-use, carbon-in-soil, and regenerative narratives.

name: Human Rights Day
description: Celebrates the adoption of the Universal Declaration of Human Rights. Increasingly linked to climate justice, environmental rights, and corporate accountability.
content_hook: Climate justice and rights-based approach to sustainability. Connect human rights to environmental outcomes and corporate responsibility.

name: International Mountain Day
description: Highlights the importance of mountains for water supply, biodiversity, and climate regulation. Mountain ecosystems are among the most climate-sensitive.
content_hook: Mountain ecosystems and glacial retreat storytelling. Relevant for climate adaptation, water scarcity, and Andean/Himalayan narratives.

name: G20 Summit
description: US-hosted G20. Indications the US may use it to promote fossil fuels. South Africa excluded partly due to green policies.
content_hook: Monitor geopolitical climate dynamics. Content hook around corporate climate leadership maintaining momentum even when governments falter.
